description: Memory graph, narrative memory, curriculum, and learning signal management for GEP agent cognition. All source files are obfuscated; API was recovered from test files and partially readable exports.

classes.name: memoryGraph
classes.note: Core agent memory store. Appends events to a JSONL file and maintains state JSON. Fully obfuscated source.
properties: MEMORY_GRAPH_PATH (env: string) - path to .jsonl event log
EVOLUTION_DIR (env: string) - directory for state files
persistent_files: memory_graph_state.json - current state including last_action and epoch

classes.name: memoryGraphAdapter
classes.note: HTTP adapter that wraps a remote memory graph server. Uses fetch+AbortController. Fully obfuscated source. 6 internal functions.
properties: Remote URL from env (MEMORY_GRAPH_URL or similar)

classes.name: narrativeMemory
classes.note: Narrative/story-form memory for agent cognition. Fully obfuscated; 6 internal functions. Likely reads/writes a narrative JSONL/JSON file.

classes.name: curriculum
classes.note: Agent learning curriculum – manages learning targets and priorities. Fully obfuscated; 11 internal functions. Uses 'curriculum_target:frontier:*' signal pattern.

classes.name: learningSignals
classes.note: Signal tagging and scoring subsystem. Source partially readable via module.exports. Produces structured tags (problem:*, area:*, risk:*, action:*).

key_relationships: memoryGraphAdapter wraps memoryGraph (HTTP adapter pattern, remote endpoint)
learningSignals provides tag classification consumed by solidify.js (adaptGeneFromLearning, buildSoftFailureLearningSignals)
curriculum uses 'curriculum_target:frontier:*' signals routed through memoryGraph.computePredictiveBoost
narrativeMemory is a sibling subsystem to memoryGraph within the GEP cognition layer
evolve.js (orchestrator) depends_on memoryGraph for advice + recording
evolve.js depends_on memoryGraphAdapter for external candidate recording
selector.js reads MemoryAdvice (bannedGeneIds, preferredGeneId) from memoryGraph
interaction_flow: GEP cycle start → memoryGraph.getMemoryAdvice(signals, genes) → MemoryAdvice
Execution started → memoryGraph.recordAttempt(signals, gene) → {actionId, signalKey} + state file written
Outcome observed → memoryGraph.recordOutcomeFromState(signals, obs) → MemoryGraphEvent (kind=outcome) with predictive field
important_notes: All 5 source files (memoryGraph, memoryGraphAdapter, narrativeMemory, curriculum, learningSignals) are obfuscated with heavy string encoding. learningSignals exports were decoded from hex-escaped strings.
memoryGraph persists two files: memory_graph.jsonl (append-only event log) and memory_graph_state.json (mutable current state).
computeSignalKey deduplicates and sorts signals before hashing → deterministic key regardless of order.
Epoch boundary mechanism resets gene preferences on env change or failure streak (consecutive_failure_streak_5, failure_loop_detected signals).
curriculum_target:frontier:* signals trigger frontier_touched=true in computePredictiveBoost.
memoryGraphAdapter uses fetch with AbortController (timeout-aware HTTP calls); remote URL from env var.
narrativeMemory and curriculum APIs not recoverable from IR (all obfuscated, no test coverage found).
learningSignals tag output follows structured namespace: problem:X, area:X, risk:X, action:X patterns used by solidify.adaptGeneFromLearning.
